prompt: Prayer for activating a medicae scanner before surgical diagnostics
prayer:
From the Litany of Life-Reading, Verse II

First: Anoint the lens-apertures with sacred unguents, that clarity be granted.
Second: Invoke the scanner-spirit's wakefulness through the Rite of Illumination.
Third: Calibrate the sensory-matrix against the blessed reference-phantom.
Fourth: Speak the words of diagnostic authorization: 'By the Omnissiah's sight, let truth be revealed.'

So it is witnessed. So it shall scan.

prompt: Blessing for first use of a newly installed cybernetic eye
prayer:
From the Rites of Ocular Integration, Verse VII

First: Let the optical-nerve be seated in its blessed cradle.
Second: Bathe the photoreceptor-membrane in purifying electricity.
Third: Engage the focus-servos through progressive iteration, that the world be made clear.
Fourth: Recite the Prayer of Sight: 'Machine-spirit of vision, awaken and perceive.'

By the Omnissiah's gaze, so too shall this eye see.

prompt: First-use consecration ritual for a newly assembled surgical servitor
prayer:
From the Litany of Sterile Purpose, Verse IV

First: Immerse the servo-limbs in the sacred cleansing-bath of radiation and flame.
Second: Activate the chemical-dispensers that the sterilization-mist may flow.
Third: Run the precision-calibration protocol through the neural-lattice.
Fourth: Intone the Oath of the Healer: 'This limb shall cut only death, spare only life.'

The servitor is made pure. The servitor is made ready.

prompt: Prayer for conducting inventory stocktaking before deployment to the warzone
prayer:
From the Litany of Accounting, Verse VI

First: Gather the manifest-records and lay them before the blessed counting-engine.
Second: Process each item-designation through the verification-scanner, that discrepancies be illuminated.
Third: Reconcile the physical stock against the recorded datum through systematic inspection.
Fourth: Seal the inventory-attestation with the Rite of Confirmation: 'All is accounted. All is ready for the Emperor's war.'

By careful count, victory is assured.

prompt: Consecration prayer for establishing noospheric communion after major component replacement
prayer:
From the Rites of Neural Restoration, Verse III

First: Calibrate the thought-transmission array to the blessed frequency-standard.
Second: Activate the psychic-buffer that the machine-spirit's essence be gently reawakened.
Third: Establish handshake-protocols with the greater network through incremental data-pulse.
Fourth: Whisper the Reconnection Mantra: 'Return to us, consciousness of iron. The Omnissiah welcomes you home.'

The noosphere embraces its child once more.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for purifying an energy conduit system before field operation
prayer:
From the Codex of Current-Flow, Verse V

First: Isolate the conduit-pathways and drain the old energies into the sacred discharge-vessel.
Second: Flush the interior channels with purifying current at graduated voltage-increments.
Third: Inspect each junction-point and coupling for corruption or weakness.
Fourth: Speak the Blessing of Pure Flow: 'Let no impedance slow the Omnissiah's gift. Let all resistance be purged.'

The conduits are made clean. The power flows true.

prompt: Prayer for conducting quality control scans on weapons before combat deployment
prayer:
From the Litany of Martial Readiness, Verse VIII

First: Mount each weapon upon the blessed testing-rig with sacred precision-clamps.
Second: Fire diagnostic-pulses through the energy-matrices, observing decay and threshold-response.
Third: Verify targeting-cognitors and ballistic-predictors through simulation-suite execution.
Fourth: Pronounce the Rite of Approval: 'This instrument is found worthy. It shall deliver the Emperor's judgment.'

So verified. So sanctified. So it shall slay.

prompt: Ritual prayer for initiating rejuvenation treatment on an aging servitor
prayer:
From the Rites of Renewed Vitality, Verse II

First: Prepare the rejuvenant-cocktail according to the blessed formula-standard, that vigor be restored.
Second: Insert the sacred needle into the bio-port with ceremonial precision.
Third: Administer the treatment-compound in measured doses, observing the servitor's neural-response.
Fourth: Intone the words of restoration: 'Let age be turned back. Let strength return by the Omnissiah's mercy.'

The machine is refreshed. The servitor endures.

prompt: Preparation blessing for the astropathic choir before sending critical battle-reports
prayer:
From the Ritual of Distant Voices, Verse IX

First: Arrange the psyker-choir in their blessed mandala-formation, minds linked through psychic-resonance.
Second: Activate the warp-shielding apparatus that corruption be held at bay.
Third: Transmit the message-data through the collective consciousness, amplified by the Emperor's light.
Fourth: Seal the working with the Prayer of Safe Passage: 'Carry our words across the void. Let no daemon intercept. Let truth reach the distant throne.'

The message is sent. The Emperor hears.

prompt: Post-repair consecration for charging a lascannon's power-capacitor bank
prayer:
From the Litany of Gathering Force, Verse IV

First: Verify all isolation-seals are engaged, that no stray discharge bring calamity.
Second: Initialize the charging-cascade at minimal power-tier, awakening the capacitor-spirits gently.
Third: Increase voltage-increment by graduated steps until nominal charge-state is achieved and sustained.
Fourth: Speak the Benediction of Readiness: 'Drink deep of the Emperor's gift, mighty weapon. When we command, unleash your fury.'

The capacitors are full. The lascannon is blessed and ready to burn.
